title: zappania globiflora
intro: Zappania globiflora, also known as the Zappania globiflora plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Combretaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of fever, coughs, and respiratory infections due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Zappania globiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Zappania globiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies as a poultice or topical application.
